title: Leptochilus pandurifolius

intro: Leptochilus pandurifolius, also known as the Pandurata, is a species of creeping fern native to tropical regions of Asia. The Pandurata is valued for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The plant's bioactive constituents include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
